title: SinoCate
body: ## SinoCate -- Traditional Chinese food, Sino cultures #### Required APIs - Fabric API #### Supports - Fabric only now - Forge will be supported #### Description Videos 1. [Bilibili (Chinese)](https://www.bilibili.com/video/av894286996) 2. [Bilibili](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1cY41157i3/) > Haven't uploaded to YouTube yet. Sorry for that. -- GregTao #### Description Text Struct your machine simply and traditionally, cook and enjoy Chinese culture! This mod is under develop, so there is not too much content for playing. Backup your map before initialize this mod!
